since_last: 31% of 84 AI names green; AI Applications & Data Software leads +0.02%; AI bubble risk 57 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: broad selling, 31% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -0.45% · BTC -0.93% · Gold -0.98% · Nasdaq100 -1.77%. 31% of 84 AI names are green — broad selling. AI Applications & Data Software is doing the heavy lifting at +0.02%.

cards.headline: AI Applications & Data Software leads, AI Chips & Compute lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Applications & Data Software at +0.02%; weakest is AI Chips & Compute at -4.74%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: AMBA is the standout at -10.95%
cards.body: Leaders: NET +8.03%, INTU +3.11%, EQIX +3.10%, WDAY +2.78%, META +2.50%. Laggards: AMBA -10.95%, INTC -10.44%, TER -9.03%, CGNX -8.29%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -5.87% at $151.01
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -5.87% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 57 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 57/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
